title: Official Launch Caravan
description: Guide a desert launch sled between lanes, swap its permit color to clear official gates, and time risky trailer launches to keep the convoy alive.

howToPlayJson.title: Official Launch Caravan
howToPlayJson.objective: Survive a 2-4 minute desert run by switching between three lanes, matching your sled color to incoming official gate seals, and using the trailer-launch twist to vault blocked patterns for the highest leaderboard score.

controls.outcome: Moves the launch sled into an adjacent lane.
Cycles the sled between red, blue, and gold to match the next gate.
Fires the attached trailer forward to break one gate row or collect a distant combo line, but leaves you without that

steps: Start in the center lane with a color-coded official permit on your sled.
Incoming gate rows roll down the desert in three lanes; pass only through a gate that matches your current permit color.
Wrong-color contact or hitting a sealed barrier costs your trailer if attached; the next mistake ends the run.
Every few seconds an Official Order banner appears at the top and temporarily marks one color as double-score priority, forcing fast reroute
Your sled tows a launch trailer by default. Hold and release to launch it into an upcoming row, punching a safe hole or grabbing a hard-to-r
After launching, you cannot tank a mistake until a new trailer is earned by clearing a full set of priority gates.
Speed increases, mixed-color gate clusters get tighter, and fake safe lanes with locked official seals begin appearing after the first minut
Build combo by clearing consecutive matching gates without damage; maintain it through order changes to multiply score.
howToPlayJson.scoring: Score 1 point per cleared gate, +bonus for priority-color gates during each Official Order, and increase a combo multiplier every 5 perfect clears. Launching the trailer through a row and then threading the opened gap in
tips: Read the next two rows before swapping color; late lane changes are safer than panic color cycling.
Save trailer launches for double-blocked patterns or priority gates you cannot line up normally.
If an Official Order changes the hot color, keep combo alive first and chase bonus second.
Audio helps: each color has a distinct chime, and the order change uses a sharp horn cue.
